title: Assistant Store Manager - ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions:
ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
